block_01: Advanced strategy for in-depth technical analysis
block_02: Many traders believe that price movements follow some long-term patterns. This means that you may be able to spot them and use these patterns to open or close deals at the optimal moment.
block_03: The Elliott Wave Theory offers a set of rules to detect patterns in market activity. By applying these rules, you may enhance your technical analysis and never miss a promising trading opportunity. Keep reading to find out how to get the most from this great trading strategy.
block_10: 3 Common Mistakes of Novice Traders
block_11: Did you know that many beginner traders make the same mistakes? Read this material to find out if you are one of them.
block_13: All You Need to Know about Take-Profit and Stop-Loss
block_14: Learn to apply these basic tools to maximize profits and manage losses in trading.
